// 0x809f: ProcessType[table<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 0c 79 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x80aa: ProcessType[table<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 18 79 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x80b5: ProcessType[table<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 24 79 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x80c0: ProcessType[time.fileSizeError]
	ProcessString 6f 01 00 00 
	Return
